rulings.Case Title: PAUL A. VANDER WAERDT VS. CHARLES M. COLLINS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, JUNE 16, 2008 LINE 7. DEFENDANT CHARLES COLLINS (AMENDED) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART: DENIED AS TO ISSUES 1 - 3 BECAUSE DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN. DEFENDANT DOES NOT DEMONSTRATE THAT A BREACH OF ORAL CONTRACT CAUSE OF ACTION IN THE ASIAN PERINATAL ADVOCATES CASE WOULD BE TIME BARRED. DENIED AS TO ISSUES 4 - 6 BECAUSE DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN. PLAINTIFF'S INTERROGATORY RESPONSE IS NOT FACTUALLY DEVOID AND DEFENDANT DOES NOT ADDRESS THE JANUARY 5, 2004 SETTLEMENT OFFER, WHICH WAS GREATER THAN PLAINTIFF'S ULTIMATE RECOVERY. GRANT AS TO ISSUE SEVEN. PLAINTIFF'S INTERROGATORY RESPONSES ARE FACTUALLY DEVOID AND PLAINTIFF DOES NOT PRESENT ANY CONTRAVERTING EVIDENCE. GRANT AS TO ISSUES 8 - 10 UNDER LISKA. PLAINTIFF IS ATTEMPTING TO RE-LITIGATE THE FEE CLAIMS. =(302/PHA/PB)
